# Amagna AI

> Amagna AI builds and runs Autonomous Marketing Systems: we build a business's
> marketing machine — website, funnels, ads, content, SEO — and the AI agent crew
> that runs it, so growth runs itself. Based in Saginaw, Michigan, serving the
> Great Lakes Bay Region and operators nationwide.

Amagna AI is an AI marketing agency for operators who want their marketing to run
itself. The core product is a done-for-you marketing system fulfilled by a crew of
custom AI agents. We also install bespoke, full-stack AI in person (Custom AI Installs).

## What we do

- AI-generated content (video, images, blogs, social)
- Managed paid ads across Meta, TikTok, Google, and Snapchat
- Google Business Profile, local SEO, and answer-engine optimization (AEO)
- A central memory layer that keeps brand voice and context consistent
- Full-stack automations and custom AI agents/workflows for the business
- Automated review generation and weekly reporting

## Who we serve

Five niches, each with a dedicated funnel: home services (HVAC, plumbing, roofing,
electrical, landscaping), real estate agents and owners, medical offices (dental,
med-spa, specialty clinics), ecommerce brands, and multi-location businesses. The
core offering serves any operator who wants marketing that runs itself — not one niche only.

## Pricing

- Foundation — one-time $1,000 build (delivered in 7 business days), then $50/mo for
  infrastructure. The system base without the AI crew: branding kit, conversion-ready
  website, Google Business Profile + base local SEO, dashboard. No managed ads or content.
- Growth — $1,250/mo + ad spend. The full done-for-you machine run by the crew: niche
  funnel, managed Meta/TikTok/Google/Snapchat campaigns, AI video, GBP + local SEO + AEO,
  automated review generation, weekly report.
- Authority — $2,000/mo + ad spend + metered token usage. Everything in Growth plus
  full business automation: custom AI agents and workflows, plus founder-led strategy.
- Custom AI Installs — bespoke full-stack AI installed in person. Large one-time build
  fee, then a low monthly retainer ($250–$500/mo) plus pass-through expenses. Scoped per business.

Ad spend is separate and paid directly to the ad platforms ($25/day minimum). There is a
6-month minimum on the monthly plan after the system is deployed. No separate setup fee —
month one is the build.

## How to start

The Gold Map is our free qualification funnel: a personalized, step-by-step marketing
plan built for your business. Start at https://amagna.co/audit, then book a call.

## Service area

Headquartered in Saginaw, Michigan. Primary local focus: the Great Lakes Bay Region
(Saginaw, Midland, Bay City) and Michigan. Available to operators nationwide.
